title: ClickUp Fired 290 Workers and Replaced Them With AI Agents
script: ClickUp just rewrote the company playbook. The project management software startup laid off 22 percent of its team — 290 people — and replaced them with 3,000 AI agents. That's a 10-to-1 ratio of bots to humans. CEO Zeb Evans calls it the 100x org. Surviving employees can now earn $1 million per year in cash. The message: master AI or become obsolete. Every company is watching.
